_rationale: semantic_annotations label='pure' on multi-lang corpus: corpus's add() functions are not annotated with @pure (the annotation system requires explicit markers in comments/decorators), so both Go and C++ return {total_count:0, annotations:[]}. Byte-identical 123-byte payloads. Probe: /tmp/parity-iter4/semantic_annotations___label___pure.{go,cpp}.json. Retrofitted with _rationale per iter-7 karpathy rule. Content-free but green — to lock real annotation parity, a future iter should add a corpus with @pure markers (or use the propagation engine's inferred-purity output, which IS populated on this corpus per side_effects/basic).

tiers._rationale_stable: Envelope matches MCP spec. result.content[].text byte-for-byte identical empty-annotations payload. Locks the dispatch path and the empty-result serialization shape. When a populated-annotation corpus lands the descriptor can stay stable-text without modification.
